deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: Aalto demo
deck.outline:
1. Aalto University: Innovation and Education - Aalto University is a leading Finnish institution focused on innovation, sustainability, and interdisciplinary education.
2. Six Schools, Open Opportunities - Aalto operates through six schools covering arts, engineering, business, and science, offering courses open to everyone regardless of background.
3. Join the Aalto Community - Aalto fosters creative sustainability and scientific breakthroughs, inviting visitors to explore campus and upcoming events.

slide-01.intent: Introduce the presentation topic and establish a direct, practical tone for the audience.
slide-01.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a leading Finnish institution focused on innovation, sustainability, and interdisciplinary education. without reducing readability.
slide-01.mustInclude: Aalto University is a leading Finnish institution focused on innovation, sustainability, and interdisciplinary education.
slide-01.notes: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a leading Finnish institution focused on innovation, sustainability, and interdisciplinary education. without reducing readability.
slide-01.title: Aalto University: Innovation and Education
slide-01.value: Aalto University is a leading Finnish institution focused on innovation, sustainability, and interdisciplinary education.

slide-02.intent: Explain the academic structure and open learning opportunities available at the university.
slide-02.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto operates through six schools covering arts, engineering, business, and science, offering courses open to everyone regardless of background. without reducing readability.
slide-02.mustInclude: Aalto operates through six schools covering arts, engineering, business, and science, offering courses open to everyone regardless of background.
slide-02.notes: Focus on the six schools and open learning opportunities without reducing readability.
slide-02.title: Six Schools, Open Opportunities
slide-02.value: The audience gains a clear understanding of the academic structure and can identify relevant study paths.

slide-03.intent: Summarize key takeaways and invite further engagement with Aalto University.
slide-03.layoutHint: Include a high-contrast call-to-action button or QR code placeholder for visiting the website or viewing events.
slide-03.mustInclude: Aalto fosters creative sustainability and scientific breakthroughs, inviting visitors to explore campus and upcoming events.
slide-03.notes: Summarize key takeaways and invite further engagement with Aalto University.
slide-03.title: Join the Aalto Community
slide-03.value: Aalto fosters creative sustainability and scientific breakthroughs, inviting visitors to explore campus and upcoming events.
